positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a cosmic forest at twilight. Deep indigo and vibrant electric blue dominate the background, filled with bioluminescent foliage and gently glowing geometric flora. In the center, a majestic, stylized crescent moon shaped tree stands, its branches interwoven with glowing nebulae dust. The overall style is neo-Art Nouveau meeting cosmic vaporwave, characterized by clean, thick lines, strong silhouettes, and high contrast. The composition must be central and symmetrical, perfect for printing on fabric. Flat illustration style, vector graphic quality, excellent detail, high resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photo, realism, photo-realistic, jpeg artifacts, messy
